triage.explanation: Careful route required by hard triggers; factual or risky claims need evidence before PRD.

problem: Existing YOLO demand router schema readiness must block PRD readiness when any evidence agent reports missing evidence, clarify, block, or failed status.
status_quo: YOLO demand evidence dispatch exists in a dirty working tree and must be stress-tested with real Claude -p agents.
desired_outcome: Evidence missing and clarify recommendations become blockers and cannot produce prd_ready true.
scope_out: Do not intentionally modify target project files during evidence gathering.
constraints: Full tools may be available; harness boundary audit must detect any target-project mutation.
acceptance_criteria: Evidence missing and clarify recommendations become blockers and cannot produce prd_ready true.
risks: A PRD could be generated from incomplete evidence if missing fields are ignored.

agent_results.claim: Existing YOLO demand router schema readiness already blocks PRD readiness when any evidence agent reports missing evidence, clarify, block, or failed status.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function converts missing/clarify/block into blockers
evidence.why: Core blocking logic for evidence agent results

evidence.summary: Missing evidence items trigger EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker
evidence.why: Shows how missing array becomes blocker code

evidence.summary: Clarify/block recommendations trigger EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED
evidence.why: Shows how clarify/block verdicts become blockers

evidence.summary: Blockers from evidenceResultBlockingIssues are added to readiness blockers array
evidence.why: Shows integration of blocking issues into final blocker list

evidence.summary: prd_ready is calculated as blockers.length === 0
evidence.why: Shows that any blocker prevents prd_ready from being true

evidence.summary: Test case validates missing and clarify recommendations become blockers and prevent PRD readiness
evidence.why: Executable test evidence that the blocking logic works as intended

evidence.summary: Assertions check for EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blocker codes
evidence.why: Concrete test expectations for blocker codes

evidence.summary: Test asserts readiness.prd_ready equals false when missing/clarify exist
evidence.why: Test evidence that blockers prevent prd_ready true

risks: If the claim is wrong, the PRD readiness gate could pass when evidence agents report missing/clarify/block, allowing PRD generation without required evidence validation

result.notes: The blocking logic already exists and works correctly. The demand asks to make evidence missing and clarify recommendations become blockers that prevent prd_ready true, but this is already implemented in src/demand/router.ts:481-511 and validated by tests. No fix is needed; the behavior is already working as specified.

agent_results.claim: Existing YOLO demand router schema readiness already blocks PRD readiness when any evidence agent reports missing evidence, clarify, block, or failed status.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function converts missing/clarify/block into blocker codes
evidence.why: Primary blocking logic implementation

evidence.summary: Missing evidence items trigger EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker when missing array has items
evidence.why: Verifies missing data blocking behavior

evidence.summary: Clarify/block recommendations and blocked/failed verdicts trigger EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED
evidence.why: Verifies clarify/block handling

evidence.summary: Blockers from evidenceResultBlockingIssues are pushed into blockerList
evidence.why: Integration of blocking issues into final blocker array

evidence.summary: prd_ready equals blockers.length === 0
evidence.why: Shows blockers prevent PRD readiness

evidence.summary: Test case confirms missing data and clarify recommendations block PRD readiness with expected blocker codes
evidence.why: Executable test validation of blocking behavior

evidence.summary: Cross-checker with missing array triggers EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker in test
evidence.why: Test evidence for missing data blocking

evidence.summary: Clarify recommendation triggers EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blocker in test
evidence.why: Test evidence for clarify recommendation blocking

evidence.summary: Assertions verify prd_ready equals false and both blocker codes exist when missing/clarify are present
evidence.why: Test evidence that blockers prevent prd_ready

risks: If claim is wrong, the evidence validation gate could pass with missing/clarify/block unresolved, allowing PRD generation without required evidence

result.notes: Independent verification confirms the explorer claim. The blocking logic in src/demand/router.ts correctly converts missing evidence items and clarify/block recommendations into blockers that prevent prd_ready from being true. The test in __tests__/demand-router.test.ts:313-353 validates this behavior works as intended. The demand requirement is already fully implemented and functional.

agent_results.claim: The demand requirement for evidence missing and clarify recommendations to become blockers that prevent prd_ready is already fully implemented in the codebase.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues converts missing/clarify/block into blocker codes
evidence.why: Primary implementation shows blocking logic exists

evidence.summary: Missing array triggers EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker
evidence.why: Shows missing data blocking implementation

evidence.summary: prd_ready equals blockers.length === 0
evidence.why: Shows blockers prevent PRD readiness

evidence.summary: Test validates missing/clarify become blockers and prevent prd_ready
evidence.why: Executable test confirms blocking behavior works

evidence.summary: Evidence agreement status shows pass with zero conflicts between explorer and cross-checker
evidence.why: Independent verification confirms claim with no contradictions

result.notes: Verification complete: Explorer and cross-checker independently confirmed the blocking logic exists with zero conflicts. All evidence is project-scoped from code and tests with exact paths and line numbers. No assumptions were presented as facts. No missing data remains unresolved. The demand requirement is already implemented; no PRD or implementation work is needed. The readiness blockers in current state are evidence agents not completing, not implementation gaps.
